Class AudioController

java.lang.Object
scorefour.controller.AudioController
public class AudioController extends Object
A AudioController handles all audio of the game.

  • Constructor Details

    • AudioController

      public AudioController()
      A constructor which creates a new AudioController object.

      Initializes all songs and effects, which are stored as clips.

  • Method Details

    • playSong

      public void playSong(int song)
      Plays the song of the provided index.
      Parameters:
      song - integer or static value of song

    • stopSong

      public void stopSong()
      Stops the currently active AudioController's song

    • playEffect

      public void playEffect(int effect)
      Plays the effect of the provided index.
      Parameters:
      effect - integer or static value of effect
